description: Optimize the startup performance of the DashboardApp by refactoring the heavy, initially hidden "Detailed Statistics" panel (ID: details_panel) in activity_stats.xml into a ViewStub. Extract the panel and its children into a new layout file named layout_stats_details.xml and replace the original layout in activity_stats.xml with a ViewStub using ID stub_details. Update StatsActivity.kt to inflate the ViewStub only upon clicking the "Show Details" button, ensuring the view's visibility is toggled if it is already inflated.
